title: Context-aware changeset via Ecto.Multi
prompt: In MyApp.Accounts, write a `register_user/1` function that uses Ecto.Multi to: (1) insert the user via User.registration_changeset, (2) insert a default Profile record associated with that user, (3) return {:ok, %{user: user, profile: profile}} or {:error, failed_op, failed_value, _}. Use Ecto.Multi.insert twice. Write to lib/my_app/accounts.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires Ecto.Multi composition. Hard because the pattern is non-obvious and requires transactional thinking.
